name: boutique hotel managers processing 5–15 guest check-ins/month tool
description: For boutique hotel managers processing 5–15 guest check-ins/month, inefficient check-in processes cause delays and guest dissatisfaction. We automate check-in and housekeeping management instead of manual processes.
target_audience: boutique hotel managers processing 5–15 guest check-ins/month
problem_solved: Inefficient guest check-in and management processes

locked_fields.primary_user: boutique hotel managers processing 5–15 guest check-ins/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient guest check-in and management processes
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For boutique hotel managers processing 5–15 guest check-ins/month, inefficient check-in processes cause delays and guest dissatisfaction. We automate check-in and housekeeping management instead of manual processes.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual check-in processes and paper-based management

one_liner: For boutique hotel managers processing 5–15 guest check-ins/month, inefficient check-in processes cause delays and guest dissatisfaction. We automate check-in and housekeeping management instead of manual processes.
